texto: I had a stunt double for 'The Bronze.' She's literally the most amazing human being I've ever seen. She's NCAA women's gymnastics champion. She was incredible. I would poke her thighs, and my nail would break because it was like poking a rock.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Haley Lu Richardson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I had a stunt double for 'The Bronze.' She's literally the most amazing human being I've ever see…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, women, champion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de academia e champion.

frase_original: I had a stunt double for 'The Bronze.' She's literally the most amazing human being I've ever seen. She's NCAA women's gymnastics champion. She was incredible. I would poke her thighs, and my nail would break because it was like poking a rock.
